title: 4I2. Conjunctions
intro: Like prepositions, conjunctions attach to the final syllable of the word and are sometimes repeated.
body:
MeaningFormExample & gloss
“and”gi
dongi mongi
“I and you (I and you and…)”
“again”nakhigi
“because”šai guruni
“but”huv
“only”ḳalṭo
“or”-š
haviš ketoviš
“dog or cat”
“still, yet”tsugiz
